oneOf.description: Configuration for a schedule that runs at a fixed interval
oneOf.title: Interval

type.description: Type of schedule, must be 'interval' for a schedule that runs at a fixed interval

expression.description: Interval between task runs, on the form 12s, 15m, 1h, etc.

oneOf.description: Configuration for a schedule that runs according to a cron expression
oneOf.title: Cron

type.description: Type of schedule, must be 'cron' for a schedule that runs according to a cron expression

expression.description: Cron expression defining when to run the task, on the form '0 0 * * *' (every day at midnight), '*/15 * * * *' (every 15 minutes), etc.
